query_normalized: the influence of metaphorical framing on attitudes towards mental health treatment psychology
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (f) as it investigates the epistemic and practical effects of "AI-framings" (a specific type of metaphorical framing) on the conceptual domain of human psychology and behavior, directly addressing the mechanism of how metaphorical framing influences understanding and attitudes within the psychology domain.
